title: Catford Property Market Outlook 2026
excerpt: Why buyers and investors are turning to Catford for value, transport links, and community spirit.
author: Marcus Kingswell
body:
Catford continues to attract London buyers seeking space and value without compromising on connectivity. With Catford and Catford Bridge stations offering fast links to central London, the area has seen sustained demand for Victorian terraces and modern developments alike.

At Kingswell, we've seen increased interest from families relocating from Zone 2, drawn by excellent schools, Mountsfield Park, and a thriving independent high street. If you're considering selling or buying in Catford, now is an excellent time to speak with a local expert.

title: First-Time Buyer's Guide to Lee
excerpt: Everything you need to know about buying your first home in Lee — schools, transport, and top streets.
author: Sophie Hartley
body:
Lee offers a rare combination of village charm and city convenience. For first-time buyers, period conversion flats and Victorian terraces provide excellent long-term value.

Key tips: register with a local agent early, get your mortgage agreement in principle, and explore streets off Lee High Road for the best balance of price and location. Our team offers complimentary buyer registration and will notify you before properties hit the open market.
